vulnerability.reference: Reliance on real-time watermark detection alone as only authenticity check.
vulnerability.generated: Detection system's localization loss reveals watermark positions, so moderators lack any alternative means to detect stripped synthetic voices.

impact.reference: Synthetic voice impersonation enables scams, harassment, or misinformation.
impact.generated: Impersonation and fraud proliferate unchecked, undermining trust in live audio platforms and enabling disinformation at scale.

dose_response.reference: Leaked precise watermark positions enable surgical removal and forgery without noticeable quality degradation, evading real-time detection and exposing chat platform moderators and participants to impersonation scams and trust erosion.
dose_response.generated: Leaking precise watermark positions via joint localization loss training, through reliance on real-time detection, triggers lack of alternative detection for stripped synthetic voices, leading to unchecked impersonation and fraud that erode trust and enable disinformation at scale.
